top_signals.title: China's global e-commerce push stalls as Iran war lifts costs, dampens demand - Reuters

top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran, Israel pledge to end attacks that threatened talks
top_signals.summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said that his country had neither abandoned the battlefield nor the negotiating table.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iranian Official Says Hormuz to Reopen with New Toll Regime
top_signals.summary: The Strait of Hormuz will ultimately reopen but Iran and Oman will set new conditions for passage, including transit fees, Kazem Jalali, Iran’s Ambassador to Russia, told Russian daily Izvestia in an interview on Monday. “Of course, this strait will be open, but with new conditions to be determined by the Iranian and Omani authorities,” Reuters quoted Jalali as telling the Russian newspaper. “We understand that Iran and Oman provide certain services related to this strait. And fees will be charged for those services,”…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
top_signals.summary: CEO of collapsed crypto exchange FTX has served three years in prison for misappropriating billions in customer funds
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
